channel.title: Jeffrey Ubben — 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move by Jeffrey Ubben (ValueAct Capital) — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing. Not investment advice.

item.title: Jeffrey Ubben: ADDED META (+10%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Jeffrey Ubben (ValueAct Capital) added META in Q4 2025 · 8.1% of portfolio. Activist continuing to build META exposure.

item.title: Jeffrey Ubben: NEW POSITION ENPH · Q4 2025
item.description: Jeffrey Ubben (ValueAct Capital) new position ENPH in Q4 2025 · 4.2% of portfolio. New solar position.

item.title: Jeffrey Ubben: ADDED META (+26%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Jeffrey Ubben (ValueAct Capital) added META in Q3 2025 · 1.9% of portfolio. ValueAct META add.

item.title: Jeffrey Ubben: NEW POSITION META · Q2 2025
item.description: Jeffrey Ubben (ValueAct Capital) new position META in Q2 2025 · 6.2% of portfolio. ValueAct first entered META here.

item.title: Jeffrey Ubben: ADDED DIS (+10%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Jeffrey Ubben (ValueAct Capital) added DIS in Q2 2025 · 11.2% of portfolio. Building Disney.
